hero.subtitle: Generated from your codebase. Synced with every commit. Deployed in seconds.

features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.subtitle: From writing to deployment, InkLoom handles the entire documentation lifecycle so your team can focus on building.

blockEditor.title: Write docs like you think
blockEditor.description: A block-based editor built for technical writing. Drag and drop content blocks, embed code snippets with syntax highlighting, add callouts, tabs, and interactive API playgrounds -- no Markdown required.

deploy.title: One-click to the edge
deploy.description: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages with a single click. Your docs are served from 300+ edge locations worldwide, with automatic SSL and instant cache invalidation.

openapi.title: OpenAPI in, beautiful docs out
openapi.description: Drop in your OpenAPI spec and get fully interactive API reference documentation. Automatically generates endpoint pages with request/response examples, parameters, and authentication details.

github.title: Two-way GitHub integration
github.description: Import docs from any GitHub repository. Changes sync bidirectionally -- edit in InkLoom or push to Git, everything stays in sync. Branch previews let you review doc changes alongside code PRs.

domains.title: Your brand, your domain
domains.descriptionStart: Serve docs from your own custom domain with automatic SSL. Configure subpaths like

collaboration.title: Write together, in real time
collaboration.description: See your teammates' cursors as they type. Leave inline comments, suggest edits, and resolve feedback -- all without leaving the editor. Powered by conflict-free replicated data types.

history.title: Every change, tracked
history.description: Full version history for every page. Compare revisions side by side, restore previous versions instantly, and see exactly who changed what and when.

search.title: Instant full-text search
search.description: Your users find answers in milliseconds. Client-side search index built at deploy time, with fuzzy matching, keyboard navigation, and section-level results. No external search service required.

automation.title: Documentation that writes
automation.subtitle: Point InkLoom at your codebase and watch it generate comprehensive product and developer documentation. A GitHub Action keeps everything evergreen -- docs update automatically with every PR and commit.
automation.step1Description: Commit to main or open a PR

terminal.title: Deploy from anywhere
terminal.subtitle: Use the CLI for automated deployments, CI/CD pipelines, or when you just prefer the terminal.

comparison.title: Why teams switch to InkLoom
comparison.subtitle: Teams move to InkLoom because documentation should accelerate your product, not slow it down.

pricing.title: Pay per project, not per organization
pricing.subtitle: Keep all your docs in one place. Upgrade only the projects that need it.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for personal projects and open source.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For growing teams shipping docs regularly.

ultimate.name: Ultimate
ultimate.description: For teams that need automation and scale.

calculator.title: Example: only pay for what you need
calculator.footnote: 10 docs projects, one org — pay only for the 3 that need paid features

cta.title: Ready to ship better docs?
cta.subtitle: Start with the free tier. No credit card required. Deploy your first docs site in under 5 minutes.
cta.terminalWelcome: Welcome to InkLoom. Let's build something great.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free forever for individuals.

footer.description: Documentation that writes itself. AI-powered docs that generate, sync, and deploy from your codebase.

page.disableRealtimeDescription: Other editors will no longer see your changes in real time. You'll need to manually coordinate with co-editors to make sure each other's changes are not overwritten.

general.title: General
general.description: Update your project name and description
general.deploymentSlugDescription: The URL slug for your published documentation site
general.slugFormatError: Must be 3-40 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
general.domainsValueProp: Connect your own domain like docs.yourcompany.com to your documentation site for a professional, branded experience.

general.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{projectName}"? This action cannot be undone.

branding.socialLinksDescription: Add links to your social profiles -- they'll appear as icons in the published site header
branding.brandingAndThemeDescription: Customize the look and feel of your deployed documentation site
branding.advancedBrandingDescription: Light/dark logos, custom fonts, and custom CSS
branding.advancedBrandingValueProp: Upload separate logos for light and dark modes, choose custom Google Fonts for headings and body text, and inject custom CSS to fully customize your site's appearance.
branding.advancedBrandingCardDescription: Light/dark logo variants, custom fonts, and custom CSS

content.navigationTabsDescription: Organize your documentation into separate tabs for better navigation
content.navigationTabsValueProp: Split your documentation into tabbed sections like Guides, API Reference, and Changelog for cleaner navigation.
content.apiReferenceDescription: Upload an OpenAPI specification to auto-generate API reference docs

seo.seoSettingsDescription: Control how your site appears in search results and social media
seo.customOgImageDescription: Upload a custom Open Graph image for social sharing
seo.customOgImageValueProp: Upload a custom 1200x630 image to control exactly how your documentation appears when shared on Twitter, Slack, and other platforms. Free tier includes auto-generated images with InkLoom branding.
seo.customOgImageCardDescription: Override the auto-generated Open Graph image for social sharing

ai.aiDocumentationDescription: Configure AI documentation generation defaults and API access
ai.aiDocumentationValueProp: Use AI to automatically generate comprehensive documentation from your codebase. Includes smart code analysis, Diataxis-structured output, and MDX block diversity.
ai.llmsTxtDescription: Custom content for /llms.txt -- helps AI models discover and understand your site
ai.llmsTxtPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-generate from your documentation pages...
ai.llmsTxtHelp: Served at /llms.txt on your published site. When empty, InkLoom auto-generates this file from all published pages.
ai.llmsTxtLearnMore: Learn more about the llms.txt spec

integrations.githubRepositoryDescription: Connect a GitHub repository to sync your documentation
integrations.githubRepositoryValueProp: Sync your documentation with a GitHub repository for version control, pull request previews, and CI/CD workflows.
integrations.analyticsAndScriptsDescription: Add analytics and custom scripts to your published site
integrations.analyticsAndScriptsValueProp: Track visitor behavior with Google Analytics or PostHog, and inject custom scripts for chatbots, feedback widgets, or any third-party tools.
integrations.analyticsAndScriptsCardDescription: Add analytics tracking and custom scripts to your published site

developer.apiKeysDescription: Manage API keys scoped to this project
developer.apiKeysValueProp: Generate API keys to manage your documentation programmatically via the REST API and CLI tools.

domainConfig.title: Domains
domainConfig.setSlugHint: Set a deployment slug above to get your documentation URL.
domainConfig.defaultUrlHint: This is your default documentation URL, linked to the deployment slug.
domainConfig.setPlatformDomainHint: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_DOCS_DOMAIN to configure where published docs sites appear (e.g. inkloom.dev). NEXT_PUBLIC_PLATFORM_DOMAIN controls the main platform (e.g. inkloom.io).
domainConfig.setSlugFirst: Set a deployment slug first before adding custom domains.
domainConfig.removeDomainDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {hostname}? This will delete the custom hostname from Cloudflare and remove the DNS routing.
domainConfig.cloudflareProxyWarning: If your DNS is managed by Cloudflare, ensure the CNAME record is set to DNS only (gray cloud icon), not Proxied.
domainConfig.dnsDialogDescription: Configure your DNS records to activate {hostname}.
domainConfig.dnsProxyWarning: If your DNS is managed by Cloudflare, make sure the proxy status is set to DNS only (gray cloud), not Proxied (orange cloud). The domain will not validate if the record is proxied.

analyticsConfig.title: Analytics Integrations
analyticsConfig.description: Add analytics tracking to your published documentation site. Scripts are template-generated from validated config values.
analyticsConfig.securityNote: Analytics scripts are injected as template-generated snippets (not raw HTML) to prevent XSS. They are loaded on your published documentation site only.

customScripts.title: Custom Script Injection
customScripts.description: Inject custom scripts into the HTML of your published documentation site.
customScripts.warning: Scripts are injected into your own published site (self-injection model). They run in your visitors' browsers. Only add scripts from sources you trust.

customCss.title: Custom CSS
customCss.description: Add custom CSS that will be injected after the theme styles on your published site.
customCss.warning: Custom CSS is injected directly into your published site. Incorrect styles may break your site's layout. Use browser dev tools to test before saving.

seoConfig.openGraphDescription: Default meta tags for social sharing. Per-page overrides can be set in the editor.
seoConfig.robotsTxtDescription: Custom rules appended to the auto-generated robots.txt. The sitemap reference is added automatically.

logoVariants.title: Light / Dark Logo Variants
logoVariants.description: Upload separate logos for light and dark themes. When both are set, the published site automatically switches based on the visitor's theme.

collaborators.title: Collaborators

configForm.githubRequiredDescription: Connect a GitHub repository in <link>project settings</link> to enable AI documentation generation.
configForm.productDescriptionHint: Describe your product in 1-3 sentences. This helps the AI understand what to document.
configForm.productDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g., A TypeScript SDK for building real-time collaborative applications with WebSocket support, presence tracking, and conflict-free data types.

configForm.qualityFastHint: Faster generation, shorter pages, no review phase
configForm.modelAndLimitsHint: Choose the AI model and set a page limit.
